message:
Refactor promise scope for proper catch handler access

Move resultPromise declaration outside try block so the timeout catch
handler can access it. Previously, the promise was scoped inside try,
making the void catch handler inaccessible when cleanup was needed.

This ensures that when a subprocess times out, we can properly silence
any subsequent promise rejection from the orphaned process.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
